title: Tools Dashboard Manifest
description: Place this file as `dashboard.json` in the root of any tool project to register it with the Tools Dashboard. Fields marked 'auto-detected' are optional — the update-tools skill will fill them from existing config files if omitted.

id.description: URL-safe slug, unique across all tools. Example: 'github-sign-commits'

name.description: Human-readable display name. Example: 'Commit Signing Checker'

description.description: One-paragraph description of what the tool does. Auto-detected from README.md first heading/paragraph if omitted.

type.description: Tool type. Determines which adapter the dashboard uses and which fields are required.

documentationUrl.description: Link to external docs if any.

apify.description: Required when type='apify'. Auto-detected fields: actorId (from .actor/actor.json), defaultInput (from storage/key_value_stores/default/INPUT.json), inputSchema (from .actor/INPUT_SCHEMA.json).

actorId.description: Apify actor ID ('username/actor-name'). Auto-detected from .actor/actor.json if omitted.

defaultInput.description: Pre-filled input for the Run dialog. Auto-detected from storage/key_value_stores/default/INPUT.json if omitted. NEVER include secrets here.

outputConfig.description: Tells the dashboard what outputs to expect. THIS CANNOT BE AUTO-DETECTED — you must specify it.

hasDataset.description: Whether the actor pushes data to the default dataset.

hasKvStore.description: Whether the actor writes to the default KV store.

kvHtmlReportKey.description: KV store key for the HTML report (e.g. 'report'). Dashboard will show a 'View Report' button.

kvCsvReportKey.description: KV store key for the CSV report (e.g. 'OUTPUT_CSV'). Dashboard will show a 'Download CSV' button.

scriptUrl.description: URL to the Apps Script editor.

triggerUrl.description: Web app deployment URL for direct triggering (if deployed as web app).

triggerInstructions.description: How to manually run this script (which function, prerequisites).

chromeExtension.description: Optional when type='chrome-extension'. Permissions and hostPermissions are auto-detected from manifest.json.

instructions.description: Markdown instructions for how to use.
